case_title: SPEARS, BRENDA et al vs. CRUZ, MARY ANNE CARLOS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEARS, BRENDA SPEARS, CLARENCE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, MARY ANNE CARLOS DOES 1-100 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-15-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-16-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-27-1999

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUZ, MARY ANNE CARLOS
ARBITRATION OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2000, CONTINUED TO JUL-07-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-15-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEARS, BRENDA SPEARS, CLARENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, MARY ANNE CARLOS $16,470.61 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,470.61, DEFENDANT TO PAY $8172.61 TO PLTF BRENDA SPEARS AND $8298 TO PLTF CLARENCE SPEARS. NO AWARD OF COSTS.
